title: Active Lane Objective Beacons
summary: Added compact objective beacons inside every mounted lane stage so the active objective, progress, gate pressure, and next choice remain visible while browsing the lane cockpit.
proof: Rendered objective, progress, gates, and next choice from existing lane state.
Kept the beacons sticky and compact inside the mounted stage, with horizontal mobile behavior instead of stacked scroll.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the unlock.
